nasb.text: Five cubits was the one wing of the cherub and five cubits the other wing of the cherub; from the end of one wing to the end of the other wing were ten cubits.

esv.text: Five cubits was the length of one wing of the cherub, and five cubits the length of the other wing of the cherub; it was ten cubits from the tip of one wing to the tip of the other.

cnv.text: 第一個基路伯一邊的翅膀長兩公尺兩公寸，另一邊的翅膀也是兩公尺兩公寸；由這翅膀尖到那翅膀尖共有四公尺四公寸。

ccb.text: 各有两个二点二五米长的翅膀，双翅展开，两翅尖相距四点五米。
